paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the Switch Transformer architecture, simplifying Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) routing to single-expert activation (k=1) while maintaining computational efficiency and scalability. Enables training of sparse models with lower precision (bfloat16) and achieves 7x+ speedups in pre-training with the same computational resources
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding and generation, multilingual tasks, and efficient large-scale NLP processing
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models with improved computational efficiency through sparse activation patterns
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Simplified sparse routing mechanism enabling efficient scaling of transformer models with fewer experts while improving training stability and reducing overhead. Demonstrates 4x speedup over T5-XXL with similar FLOPs per token
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual NLP, large-scale language modeling, and accelerated fine-tuning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of transformer models via sparse activation patterns
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Optimized sparse routing architecture that balances computational efficiency and model performance, particularly effective in resource-limited environments with fewer experts
raw_extraction.application: Low-resource deployment scenarios, lightweight multilingual applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Resource-efficient scaling of transformer models with minimal performance degradation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Reduced complexity sparse routing that maintains model efficacy with significantly fewer experts, ideal for constrained hardware configurations
raw_extraction.research_problem: Minimalist sparse activation for efficient transformer scaling
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the **Switch Transformer** architecture, replacing dense layers with a sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) mechanism that dynamically routes tokens to specialized experts, improving efficiency and scalability without sacrificing performance. This enables training of extremely large models (trillion parameters) with minimal computational overhead
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, question answering, summarization, multilingual tasks, knowledge-intensive reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models efficiently to trillion-parameter regimes while maintaining performance and stability
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised discriminative fine-tuning on downstream NLP tasks (e.g., GLUE, SuperGLUE, summarization, QA)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Switch Transformer with 64 experts, demonstrating superior sample efficiency and speed advantages over dense baselines (e.g., T5-Base/Large) while maintaining comparable quality. Enables training in fewer steps/time for equivalent performance
raw_extraction.application: High-performance language modeling, accelerated pretraining, and downstream NLP applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Optimizing transformer scaling for efficiency and speed in large-scale pretraining
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on GLUE, SuperGLUE, and other NLP tasks with selective dropout (0.1 for non-expert layers, 0.4 for expert layers)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Switch Transformer with 32 experts, showing balanced trade-offs between sparsity, speed, and quality. Demonstrates how expert count impacts training efficiency and model performance
raw_extraction.application: Resource-constrained language modeling, accelerated pretraining workflows
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing sparsity, computational efficiency, and model quality in large-scale transformers
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning with optimized dropout (0.1 for non-expert layers, 0.4 for expert layers)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Switch Transformer with 16 experts, illustrating how reducing expert count affects training speed and quality. Validates the architecture’s robustness across varying sparsity levels
raw_extraction.application: Lightweight language modeling, edge deployment scenarios
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating sparsity trade-offs in transformer architectures for efficiency
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Standard fine-tuning with dropout (0.1 for non-expert layers)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparse expert architectures that partition transformer layers into specialized experts, improving efficiency and scalability while maintaining performance through expert-parallelism
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual language understanding, general-purpose language modeling, and downstream NLP tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed-source (not specified in paper, inferred from typical Meta practices)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models to trillion-parameter sizes with efficient sparsity patterns
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparse expert architectures that partition transformer layers into specialized experts, improving efficiency and scalability while maintaining performance through expert-parallelism
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual language understanding, general-purpose language modeling, and downstream NLP tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models to trillion-parameter sizes with efficient sparsity patterns
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparse expert architectures that partition transformer layers into specialized experts, achieving FLOP-matching with dense models while reducing memory requirements through expert-parallelism and model-parallelism
raw_extraction.application: High-performance language modeling, advanced NLP tasks requiring massive computational resources
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models to trillion-parameter sizes with efficient sparsity patterns
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on knowledge-heavy tasks (e.g., TriviaQA, ANLI)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the largest Switch Transformer model with 1.6 trillion parameters, utilizing expert-parallelism exclusively to maximize efficiency while achieving superior performance relative to dense alternatives
raw_extraction.application: Cutting-edge research in large-scale language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Trillion-parameter language model scaling with expert-level sparsity
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Mixture of Experts (MoE)** with dynamic routing to replace feed-forward layers, enabling efficient scaling to trillions of parameters while maintaining lower compute requirements than dense models. Uses **No-Token-Left-Behind** routing to prevent token loss during expert overflow
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale text corpus (likely similar to C4 or WebText)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, pre-training, fine-tuning, and multi-task learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models efficiently with high parameter counts while optimizing compute efficiency and stability
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning on downstream tasks (e.g., SuperGLUE, ANLI, knowledge-based tasks)
raw_extraction.extension: Dynamic expert selection via input jitter for balanced exploration-exploitation tradeoff
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Extends Switch-Base with increased model capacity (larger expert capacities and more experts), leveraging MoE sparsity for superior efficiency-per-step performance compared to dense alternatives
raw_extraction.application: Advanced language understanding, specialized knowledge tasks, and high-capacity pre-training
raw_extraction.research_problem: Optimizing large-scale language model training with mixed expertise and reduced compute overhead
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on reasoning and knowledge-intensive tasks (e.g., TriviaQA, ANLI)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a **trillion-parameter variant** (1.6T) with enhanced stability techniques, though downstream performance gaps persist relative to smaller Switch-XXL models despite higher FLOPs per token
raw_extraction.application: High-end pre-training, specialized domain adaptation, and extreme-scale inference
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating scaling laws in sparse expert architectures for ultra-large language models
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on fact-based and reasoning tasks (e.g., SQuAD)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
